codeReview.summary: The release-governance packet provides the required review controls without widening the code slice. The updated packet record and dedicated release-gate artifact name the implementer/reviewer/QA/release roles, preserve the exact proof commands for the merge-gate packet, document rollback expectations, and record explicit frontend/OpenAPI parity evidence, including the no-op frontend tracker entry. Although the compose-backed runtime was not running during this governance session, the packet handles that correctly by recording degraded runtime evidence instead of treating it as a proof waiver, while relying on the already-green targeted regression pack and `gate-fast` results.

summary: PASS. The merge-gate packet now has named ownership, proof, rollback notes, and frontend parity evidence, and it properly returns control to the orchestrator for base-branch review.
